code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: ONLY a single number: 1, 2, 3, 4, or 5
    - Do NOT output any explanation, text, symbols, or punctuation
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    CRITICAL BOUNDARIES:
    - Functional limitation → 4 (even with "love/perfect" language)
    - Context limitation (not product flaw) → 5
    - Emotional endorsement (pet/child reaction) → 5
    - Core function not served → 3
    - "Would recommend" without "if/but" → 5
    - "Would recommend" with qualification → 4
    - Moderate praise without "excellent/perfect" → 4

    4 vs 5 DECISION CLARIFICATIONS:
    IF review contains ANY of:
      - Functional limitation → 4
      - "Wish..." or "Not perfect" → 4
      - Qualified recommendation → 4
    ELSE IF contains ANY of:
      - Context limitation → 5
      - Emotional endorsement → 5
      - Unqualified "love/excellent" → 5
</DynamicRules>

</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1 (1★ - Product failure):
Review: This item died within 2 months. We checked all recommendations and it still doesn't work. Complete waste of money.
Rating: 1

Example 2 (2★ - Functional disappointment):
Review: Arrived with deep scratches and faded color. Works but very disappointing appearance.
Rating: 2

Example 3 (3★ - Core function not served):
Review: It is very thick and doesn't fit jars. Bought without paying attention. Will buy bottled drinks instead. Appears sturdy though.
Rating: 3

Example 4 (4★ - Functional limitation):
Review: There are two kinds of storage bins - reinforced and not. This reinforced one stands up better but still tears if overloaded. Good for light use.
Rating: 4

Example 5 (4★ - Qualified recommendation):
Review: Cute napkin rings! Would recommend if you check for rough edges. Modern design admired by guests.
Rating: 4

Example 6 (5★ - Context limitation):
Review: Bought these for sending leftovers. Easier than expensive containers since I don't care if they return.
Rating: 5

Example 7 (5★ - Emotional endorsement):
Review: This rug is so plush my dog claimed it! Sustainable, reversible, and machine washable.
Rating: 5

</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
